svg.title: Synalux POS — refund
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for refund. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Manager authorization required for Wrong Item refunds | Audit trail enabled
Tap items to include in partial refund
All items selected for refund. Total: $21.70 returned to card ****4521.
Wrong Item | Quality Issue | Duplicate Charge | Customer Dissatisfied | Billing Error | Other
Wrong item delivered to T2, full refund authorized
Wrong Item refunds require manager PIN regardless of amount
Audit: staff_id + reason + refund_id + amount logged to pos_audit_log (tamper-evident, immutable)
Reason: Billing Error | Cash refund (paid out)
Push: "Refund $21.70 by John S. (auth: Sara R.)"
Cancels PaymentIntent before capture. Instant reversal.
pos_refunds: id, payment_id, amount, reason, stripe_refund_id, staff_id
Both: pos_audit_log (staff_id, action, amount, reason, timestamp) | Cash refund: pos_cash_events (type=paid_out)
Stripe webhook refund.updated -> pos_refunds.status | Z-report: gross - refunds = net | refund_count + refund_total for reconciliation
